Name: Algorithm to derive ABLFL
Description: Y if VISITNUM=1, null otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.ADT
Description: SAS date from QS.QSDTC

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.ANL01FL
Description: If multiple visits fall into the same visit window, then the one closest to the target date is chosen for analysis. These are flagged with ANL01FL="Y".

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AVAL.ACTOT
Description: Sum of ADAS scores for items 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 11, 12, 13, and 14, see SAP section 14.2 for details on adjusting for missing values.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AVISIT
Description: Derived based on windowing algorithm described in SAP, Section 8.2

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWHI
Description: End day of the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWLO
Description: Start day of the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWRANGE
Description: Window range, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWTARGET
Description: Target day within the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWTDIFF
Description: Absolute difference between AWTARGET and ADY

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.AWU
Description: Assigned as "DAYS".

Name: Algorithm to derive ADADAS.BASE
Description: QS.QSSTRESN when QS.QSBLFL=Y (QS.VISITNUM=3)

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.ADURN
Description: ADURN=AENDT-ASTDT+1

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.ADURU
Description: If ADURN is not missing then ADURU='DAY'

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AENDT
Description: AE.AEENDTC, converted to a numeric SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AENDY
Description: IF AENDT>=TRTSDT>MISSING then AENDY=AENDT-TRTSDT+1 Else if TRTSDT>AENDT>MISSING then AENDY=AENDT-TRTSDT

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCC01FL
Description: Subset to CQ01NAM='' and TRTEMFL='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCC01FL=?Y?) within each Subject (Flag First Treatment Emergent Dermatological Event for Time to Event Analysis)

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCC02FL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and AESER='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCC02FL=?Y?) within each Subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCC03FL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and AESER='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), System Organ Class (AEBODSYS), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCC03FL=?Y?) within each Subject and SOC

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCC04FL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and AESER='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), System Organ Class (AEBODSYS), Preferred Term (AEDECOD), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCC04FL=?Y?) within each Subject, SOC, and PT

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCCFL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCCFL=?Y?) within each Subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCCPFL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), System Organ Class (AEBODSYS), Preferred Term (AEDECOD), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCCPFL=?Y?) within each Subject, SOC, and PT

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.AOCCSFL
Description: Subset to TRTEMFL='Y' and sort by Subject (USUBJID), System Organ Class (AEBODSYS), Start Date (ASTDT), and Sequence Number (AESEQ) and flag the first record (set AOCCSFL=?Y?) within each Subject and SOC

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.ASTDT
Description: AE.AESTDTC, converted to a numeric SAS date. Some events with partial dates are imputed in a conservative manner. If the day component is missing, a value of '01' is used. If both the month and day are missing no imputation is performed as these dates clearly indicate a start prior to the beginning of treatment. There are no events with completely missing start dates.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.ASTDTF
Description: ASTDTF='D' if the day value within the character date is imputed. Note that only day values needed to be imputed for this study.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.ASTDY
Description: IF ASTDT>=TRTSDT>MISSING then ASTDY=ASTDT-TRTSDT+1 Else if TRTSDT>ASTDT>MISSING then ASTDY=ASTDT-TRTSDT

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.CQ01NAM
Description: If AEDECOD contains any of the character strings of ('APPLICATION', 'DERMATITIS', 'ERYTHEMA', 'BLISTER') OR if AEBODSYS='SKIN AND SUBC UTANEOUS TISSUE DISORDERS' but AEDECOD is not in ('COLD SWEAT', 'HYPERHIDROSIS', 'ALOPECIA') then CQ01NAM='DERMATOLOGIC EVENTS' Otherwise CQ01NAM=NULL

Name: Algorithm to derive ADAE.TRTEMFL
Description: If ASTDT >= TRTSDT > . then TRTEMFL='Y'. Otherwise TRTEMFL='N'

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.ADT
Description: SAS date from QS.QSDTC

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.ANL01FL
Description: Set ANL01FL=Y based on SAP Page 10 analysis windows.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AVISIT
Description: Character version of the visit.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWHI
Description: End day of the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWLO
Description: Start day of the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWRANGE
Description: Window range, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWTARGET
Description: Target day within the window, specified in the SAP.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWTDIFF
Description: Absolute difference between AWTARGET and ADY

Name: Algorithm to derive ADCIBC.AWU
Description: Assigned as "DAYS".

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.ADT
Description: LB.LBDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.AENTMTFL
Description: Last observed value for this lab parameter during treatment phase: 'Y' if VISITNUM=12, if subject discontinues prior to VISIT 12, then this variable is set to 'Y' if this is the last assessment of this analyte for the subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.ANL01FL
Description: Y if the absolute value of this AVAL is the largest for the subject for VISITS 4-12 inclusive, null otherwise; only the first on-treatment AVAL that has absolute val equal to the max is flagged.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.ANRIND
Description: if AVAL < (0.5*LBSTNRLO) then ANRIND='L'. Else if AVAL > 1.5* LBSTNRHI then ANRIND='H'. ANRIND='N' otherwise. Used for shift tables

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.AVISIT
Description: Analysis Visit

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.BASE
Description: ADLBC.LBSTRESN when ADLBC.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.BR2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.BR2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.PARAM
Description: For PARAMN<100L same as LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU. For PARAMN>100: LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU concatenated with " change from previous visit, relative to normal range"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.PARAMCD
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LBTESTCD. For PARAMN>100: _ + LBTESTCD

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.R2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBC.R2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.ADT
Description: LB.LBDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.AENTMTFL
Description: Last observed value for this lab parameter during treatment phase: 'Y' if VISITNUM=12. If subject discontinues prior to VISIT 12, then this variable is set to 'Y' if this is the last assessment of this analyte for the subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.ANL01FL
Description: Y' if the absolute value of this AVAL is the largest for the subject for VISITS 4-12 inclusive. Null otherwise. Only the first on-treatment AVAL that has absolute val equal to the max is flagged

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.ANRIND
Description: if AVAL < -1 then ANRIND='L'. If AVAL > 1 then ANRIND='H'. ANRIND='N' otherwise. Null if LBBLFL=Y or AVAL=null

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.AVAL
Description: (LBSTRESN - previous LBSTRESN)/(.5*(LBSTNRHI-LBSTNRLO)). Null if LBBLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.AVISIT
Description: Analysis Visit

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.BASE
Description: ADLBCPV.LBSTRESN when ADLBCPV.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.BR2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.BR2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.PARAM
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU. For PARAMN>100: LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU concatenated with " change from previous visit, relative to normal range"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.PARAMCD
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LBTESTCD. For PARAMN>100: _ + LBTESTCD

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.R2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBCPV.R2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.ADT
Description: LB.LBDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.AENTMTFL
Description: Last observed value for this lab test during treatment phase: 'Y' if VISITNUM=12. If subject discontinues prior to VISIT 12, then this variable is set to 'Y' if this is the last assessment of this analyte for the subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.ANL01FL
Description: Y' if the absolute value of this AVAL is the largest for the subject for VISITS 4-12 inclusive. Null otherwise. Only the first on-treatment AVAL that has absolute val equal to the max is flagged

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.ANRIND
Description: If AVAL < (0.5*LBSTNRLO) then ANRIND='L'. If LAVAL > 1.5* LBSTNRHI then ANRIND='H'. ANRIND='N' otherwise. Used for shift tables.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.AVISIT
Description: Analysis Visit

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.BASE
Description: LBSTRESN when ADLBC.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.BR2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.BR2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.PARAM
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LBTEST concatenated with LBSTRESU. For PARAMN>100: LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU concatenated with "change from previous visit, relative to normal range"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.PARAMCD
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LBTESTCD. For PARAMN>100: _ + LBTESTCD

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.R2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBH.R2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.ADT
Description: LB.LBDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.AENTMTFL
Description: Last observed value for this lab test during treatment phase: 'Y' if VISITNUM=12. If subject discontinues prior to VISIT 12, then this variable is set to 'Y' if this is the last assessment of this analyte for the subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.ANL01FL
Description: Y' if the absolute value of this AVAL is the largest for the subject for VISITS 4-12 inclusive. Null otherwise. Only the first on-treatment AVAL that has absolute val equal to the max is flagged

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.ANRIND
Description: If AVAL < -1 then ANRIND='L'. If AVAL > 1 then ANRIND='H'. ANRIND='N' otherwise. Null if LBBLFL=Y or AVAL=null

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.AVAL
Description: (LBSTRESN - previous LBSTRESN)/(.5*(LBSTNRHI-LBSTNRLO)). Null if LBBLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.AVISIT
Description: Analysis Visit

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.BASE
Description: ADLBHPV.LBSTRESN when ADLBHPV.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.BR2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.BR2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI at baseline

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.PARAM
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU. For PARAMN>100: LB.LBTEST concatenated with LB.LBSTRESU concatenated with " change from previous visit, relative to normal range"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.PARAMCD
Description: For PARAMN<100: same as LBTESTCD. For PARAMN>100: _ + LBTESTCD

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.R2A1HI
Description: AVAL / A1LO

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHPV.R2A1LO
Description: AVAL / A1HI

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.ADT
Description: LB.LBDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.AVAL.BILIHY
Description: For a given visit, if param='BILI' and r2a1hi > 1.5 then aval=1. Otherwise if param='BILI' then aval=0

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.AVAL.HYLAW
Description: For a given visit, if param='BILHY' or 'TRANSHY' and if both has aval=1 then for this param then aval=1. Otherwise if for a given visit, if param='BILHY' or 'TRANSHY' then aval=0.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.AVAL.TRANSHY
Description: For a given visit, if param='ALT' or 'AST' and if either r2a1hi > 1.5 then aval=1. Otherwise if param='ALT' or 'AST' then aval=0

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.AVISIT
Description: Analysis Visit

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.BASE
Description: ADLBC.AVAL when ADLBC.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.CRIT1FL
Description: If R21AHI > 1.5 then set to 'Y'. If R2A1HI is not missing then set to 'N'. Else set to missing.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADLBHY.PARAM
Description: same as LBTEST concatenated with LBSTRESU except for hylaw params

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.ADT
Description: SAS date from QS.QSDTC

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.ANL01FL
Description: Set ANL01FL=Y based on SAP Page 10 analysis windows.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AVAL.NPTOTMN
Description: take the mean of AVAL when PARAMCD=NPTOT from week 4 to 24.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AVISIT
Description: Character version of the visit.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWHI
Description: End day of the window, specified in the SAP Page 10.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWLO
Description: Start day of the window, specified in the SAP Page 10.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWRANGE
Description: Window range, specified in the SAP Page 10.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWTARGET
Description: Target day within the window, specified in the SAP Page 10.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWTDIFF
Description: Absolute difference between AWTARGET and ADY

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.AWU
Description: Assigned as "DAYS".

Name: Algorithm to derive ADNPIX.BASE
Description: QS.QSSTRESN when QS.QSBLFL=Y.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.AGEGR1
Description: Character variable derived from ADSL.AGEGR1N

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.AGEGR1N
Description: AGEGR1 = 1 if AGE <65. AGEGR1 = 2 if AGE 65-80. AGEGR1 = 3 if AGE >80.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.AVGDD
Description: CUMDOSE/TRTDUR

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.BMIBL
Description: WEIGHTBL / ((HEIGHTBL*100)**2)

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.BMIBLGR1
Description: BMIBLGR1=Normal if . < BMIBL <25. BMIBLGR1=Overweight if 25 <=BMIBL <30. BMIBLGR1=Obese if BMIBL >=30.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.COMP16FL
Description: Y if subject has a SV.VISITNUM=10 and ENDDT>=date of visit 10, N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.COMP24FL
Description: Y if subject has a SV.VISITNUM=12 and ENDDT>= date of visit 12 , N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.COMP8FL
Description: Y if subject has a SV.VISITNUM=8 and ENDDT >= date of visit 8, N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.CUMDOSE
Description: For ARMN=0 or 1: CUMDOSE=TRT01PN*TRTDUR. --- For ARMN=2: CUMDOSE will be based on 54mg per day for the # of days subj was in 1st dosing interval (i.e., visit4date-TRTSTDT+1 if 1st interval completed, TRTEDT-TRTSTDT+1 if subj discontinued <=visit 4 and > visit 3), 81mg per day for the # of days subj was in 2nd dosing interval (i.e., visit12date-visit4date if 2nd interval completed, TRTEDT-visit4date if subj discontinued <= visit 12 and > visit 4), and 54mg per day for the # of days subj was in 3rd dosing interval (i.e., TRTEDT - visit12date if subj continued after visit 12).

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DCDECOD
Description: DS.DSDECOD where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT'

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DCREASCD
Description: Grouping of DCDECOD values to support summarizing study completion status and reason for discontinuation

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DISCONFL
Description: Y if DCREASCD ^= 'Completed'. Null otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DISONSDT
Description: MH.MHSTDTC where MHCAT='PRIMARY DIAGNOSIS' converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DSRAEFL
Description: Y if DCREASCD='Adverse Event'. Null otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DURDIS
Description: number of months between VISIT1DT and DISONSET

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.DURDSGR1
Description: grouping DURDIS values as <12 and >=12

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.EDUCLVL
Description: SC.SCSTRESN where SC.SCTESTCD=YEARSEDU

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.EFFFL
Description: Y if SAFFL='Y AND subject has at least one record in QS for ADAS-Cog with VISITNUM>3 AND at least one record in QS for CIBIC+ with VISITNUM>3. N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.EOSSTT
Description: COMPLETED if ADSL.DCDECOD='COMPLETED'. DISCONTINUED if ADSL.DCDECOD not equal to COMPLETED.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.HEIGHTBL
Description: VSSTRESN when VS.VSTESTCD='HEIGHT' and VS.VISITNUM=1

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.ITTFL
Description: Y if ARMCD ne ' '. N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.MMSETOT
Description: sum of QS.QSORRES values for the subject

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.RACEN
Description: Numeric code for RACE

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.RFENDT
Description: RFENDTC converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.SAFFL
Description: Y if ITTFL='Y' and TRTSDT ne missing. N otherwise

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.SITEGR1
Description: Refer to SAP, Section 7.1. If not pooled then SITEGR1=SITEID. If pooled, SITEGR1 will be 900

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRT01A
Description: TRT01A=TRT01P, i.e., no difference between actual and randomized treatment in this study.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRT01AN
Description: Numeric code for TRT01A which corresponds to the randomized dose

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRT01PN
Description: Numeric code for TRT01P which corresponds to the randomized dose

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRTDUR
Description: TRTEDT-TRTSDT+1

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRTEDT
Description: The date of final dose (from the CRF) is EX.EXENDTC on the subject's last EX record. If the date of final dose is missing for the subject and the subject discontinued after visit 3, use the date of discontinuation as the date of last dose. Convert the date to a SAS date.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.TRTSDT
Description: SV.SVSTDTC when SV.VISITNUM=3, converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.VISIT1DT
Description: SV.SVSTDTC when SV.VISITNUM=1, converted to SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.VISNUMEN
Description: if DS.VISITNUM=13 where DSTERM='PROTCOL COMPLETED' then VISNUMEN=12, otherwise VISNUMEN=DS.VISITNUM where DSTERM='PROTCOL COMPLETED'

Name: Algorithm to derive ADSL.WEIGHTBL
Description: VSSTRESN when VS.VSTESTCD='WEIGHT' and VS.VISITNUM=3

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.ADT
Description: if ADAE.ASTDT is not missing and occurred after TRTSDT then ADAE.ASTDT else convert ADSL.RFENDTC to a SAS numeric date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.AVAL
Description: ADT-STARTDT+1

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.CNSR
Description: if ADAE.TRTEMFL ="Y" then CNSR=0, else CNSR=1

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.EVNTDESC
Description: if ADTTE.CNSR = 0 then "Dematologic Event Occured", else if ADTTE.CNSR =1 then "Study Completion Date"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.SRCDOM
Description: The Source domain referred to in order to populate ADT (either ADAE or ADSL)

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.SRCSEQ
Description: The value of ADAE.AESEQ if SRCDOM=ADAE, otherwise null.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADTTE.SRCVAR
Description: The Source variable referred to in order to populate ADT (either ASTDT or RFENDT)

Name: Algorithm to derive ADVS.ADT
Description: the date part of VS.VSDTC converted to a SAS date

Name: Algorithm to derive ADVS.ANL01FL
Description: ANL01FL="Y" if the value is to be included in a per visit analysis. ANL01FL is missing for values from SDTM screening visits, unscheduled visits, and event related visits, e.g. "AMBUL ECG REMOVAL"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADVS.AVISIT
Description: Derived from VS.VISIT for values to be included in a per visit analysis. AVISIT is missing for values from SDTM screening visits, unscheduled visits, and event related visits, e.g. "AMBUL ECG REMOVAL", which are not included in a per visit analysis.

Name: Algorithm to derive ADVS.BASE
Description: VS.VSSTRESN where VSBLFL="Y"

Name: Algorithm to derive ADY
Description: ADY = ADT - TRTSDT + 1, if ADT>=TRTSDT. ADY = ADT - TRTSDT, if ADT<TRTSDT.

Name: Algorithm to derive ALBTRVAL
Description: Maximum of [LBSTRESN-(1.5*ULN)] and [(.5*LLN) - LBSTRESN]

Name: Algorithm to derive AVISITN
Description: Using window method in SAP Page 10 to determine AVISITN value based on ADY.

Name: Algorithm to derive BNRIND
Description: ADLBC.ANRIND when ADLBC.ABLFL=Y

Name: Algorithm to derive CHG
Description: AVAL - BASE, for post baseline records.

Name: Algorithm to derive DTYPE
Description: Value: LOCF denotes that the LOCF imputation method was used to impute the value for the given parameter and analysis visit.

Name: Algorithm to derive PCHG
Description: 100* (CHG/BASE), for post baseline records.

Name: Algorithm to derive SHIFT1
Description: Set to "High to Normal" if base=1 and aval=0. Set to "Normal to Normal" if base=0 and aval=0. Set to "Normal to High" if base=0 and aval=1.
